---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-13"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Location of folders: "C:/Users/ANowak/OneDrive - CGIAR/AE-SysRev-shared"

# Look in the "Versions transferred" folders ("priority", "non-priority"), check if the files (.xlm) are already in any of the sub-folders in "Jabesh", "Boris", "Judy" or "Charity"

# Check if theere are any duplicate papers in the team's folder - same paper in multiple template versions
# Return the duplicate papers and inspect them
# Communicate findngs to the team

```{r}

```
